_comment: SPEC §6.4: catalog.json mirrors the seeded resource_types[0] row exactly and is immutable per published version (§6.3). A new version means a new directory (v2/, v3/, ...) — never edit an existing one. The CI validator (deferred follow-up) will assert this file stays byte-identical to the matching DB row.
name: managed_database
label: Managed Database
description: Managed relational database (PostgreSQL or MySQL). AWS RDS Aurora.
